name: Anthropic (Claude)
description: Call Claude AI models directly via the Anthropic API. Supports text, vision (image input), and long-context tasks.

auth.hint: Get an API key at console.anthropic.com. Note: you must also send the header "anthropic-version: 2023-06-01" — add it via the project auth settings after creation.

tools.name: create_message
tools.description: Send a message to a Claude model and get a response. Supports system prompts, multi-turn conversations, and image inputs.

params.name: model
params.description: Claude model, e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-opus-4-8, or claude-haiku-4-5-20251001

params.name: max_tokens
params.description: Maximum tokens in the response (required by API)

params.name: messages
params.description: Messages: [{role:"user"|"assistant",content:"text or array of content blocks"}]

params.name: system
params.description: System prompt to set Claude's behavior
